case_title: JEFFERY CHARLESTON VS. JOHN STEWART COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED NOV-17-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-15-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2010 - JUDGMENT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHARLESTON, JEFFERY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHARLESTON, JEFFERY AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHARLESTON, JEFFERY AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHARLESTON, JEFFERY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY THE COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT TOOK ADEQUATE MEASURES TO WARN OF THE POTENTIALLY DANGEROUS CONDITIONS OF THE FLOORS, AND THAT PLAINTIFF WAS AWARE OF THE CONDITION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
